hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.rs ]]; then cargo fmt -- "$f"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.rs ]]; then cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
